G0.label:
case cons
α : Type u_1
a head✝ : α
tail✝ : List α
tail_ih✝ : tail✝ ≠ [] → (tail✝ ++ [a]).tail = tail✝.tail ++ [a]
h : head✝ :: tail✝ ≠ []
⊢ (head✝ :: tail✝ ++ [a]).tail = (head✝ :: tail✝).tail ++ [a]

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
a head : α
tail : List α
tail_ih : tail ≠ [] → (tail ++ [a]).tail = tail.tail ++ [a]
h : head :: tail ≠ []
⊢ (head :: tail ++ [a]).tail = (head :: tail).tail ++ [a]
